message:
fix(clippy): sweep test warnings across 9 files for zero-warning CI

- policy_compliance.rs + proptest_runtime_telemetry.rs: 3600_000 → 3_600_000
  (digit grouping consistency)
- connector_testbed.rs + proptest_connector_testbed.rs: f64 strict comparison
  → abs() < EPSILON
- policy.rs: len() > 0 → !is_empty()
- config.rs: r#"..."# → r"..." (no hashes needed)
- proptest_policy_metrics.rs: unused import, unused fn, len >= 1 → !is_empty()
- proptest_policy_compliance.rs: unused import, tautological >= 0 assertions
- proptest_policy_audit_chain.rs: tautological assertion, len >= 1,
  manual saturating_sub
- proptest_ntm_importer.rs: len >= 1, clone → from_ref

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
